title: step-monitor.ts becomes thin wrapper over jit-agents + monitor discovery
context: Current step-monitor.ts reimplements monitor classification with text parsing and ignores classify.agent. Two classify code paths exist across the project (workflow step-monitor + pi-behavior-monitors classifyViaAgent).
decision: After extraction, step-monitor.ts delegates to pi-behavior-monitors' classify pathway, which in turn calls executeAgent (classifier-mode per DEC-0004). One classify code path across the project, not two.
consequences: Monitor classify-specific logic (which collectors to run, how to assemble input, how to interpret verdict) stays in pi-behavior-monitors
LLM call + phantom tool + result extraction delegates to executeAgent
